holdings.infoBox: RFDA is an equity ETF with a total of 78 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 3.63%, NVIDIA at 3.39%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 3.02%, Johnson & Johnson at 2.93%, and Microsoft at 2.51%.

overview.description: The ALPS Dynamic US Dividend Advantage ETF (RFDA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively-managed fund that invests in US-domiciled companies with higher dividend yields than their peers within the same sector, among other factors. RFDA was launched on Jun 7, 2016 and is issued by SS&C.
